---
title: "Acknowledgement"
---

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
here::i_am("atlas-mnhnl.Rproj")
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
```



## Observer names

```{r}
#| echo: false
recorders_list <- paste(sort(na.omit(unique(MD$Recorders))), sep = ", ")
```

`r recorders_list`
